data.body: CORRECTION after repository-history audit: the prior feature-branch blocker was over-applied. Current successful precedent under RebarBotNava is direct Gerrit review to refs/for/main: closed epic 86ac-086a-20ad-4327 completed 16 children through changes #812-#835; landed commits are single-parent main commits, and origin/main has no first-parent merge commit since the 2026-07-13 Rebase-If-Necessary cutover. CLAUDE.md imports AGENTS.md, and the repository harness guidance names git push gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main. ADR 0025 warns post-cutover feature-branch interaction needs human review. Resume jira-reb-1160 using dependency-ordered direct-to-main story changes, each gated LLM-Review+1 and Verified+1 before submit/close. The failed feature-branch creation made no remote change.
